pi_items.source: export_result.sh explicitly defines SCRIPT_PATH and setup_task.sh creates the parent directory.
export_result.sh explicitly defines REPORT_PATH and setup_task.sh creates the parent directory.
setup_task.sh generates constellation_pdr.txt which explicitly sets the Semi-Major Axis to 7071.14 km.
setup_task.sh generates constellation_pdr.txt setting target eccentricity to 0.001, and verifier.py enforces an upper bound (ecc_max) of 0.01.
setup_task.sh generates constellation_pdr.txt which explicitly sets the Inclination to 98.19 deg.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting up a Walker-Delta 6/3/1 satellite constellation using synthetically generated specifications from constellation_pdr.txt. The verified target parameters are a Semi-Major Axis of 7071.14 km, an inclination of 98.19 degrees, and an eccentricity not exceeding a maximum tolerance of 0.01 (target 0.001). The expected output artifacts are the GMAT script at /home/ga/GMAT_output/walker_constellation.script and the geometry report at /home/ga/GMAT_output/constellation_report.txt.
